ticket.description:
Hi Team,

Could you please advise whether there is an option to export the data from TRACKING to an Excel file? We require the exact pickup date for reporting purposes.

Thank you.

------------------
Submitted from: https://mcsl-s.pluginhive.io/home/tracking/orders/status/allorders?pageNumber=2

comments.body:
L3 - Requirement for specific Tracking status report from the customer where they want to get the correct Pickup Date for each order in a report.

Customer had reached out to Keerthi regarding this and as per her response, moving the ticket to L3. She will be discussing about the requirement further.

Store URL - insightcosmetics.myshopify.com
App - Shopify MCSL
Carriers - Amazon Shipping and BlueDart
Labels in Nov - 2609
Active from Nov 2024 and $49 plan selected
